Author: rail
Name: AetherDraw
Punchline: A realtime multi-user whiteboard raid planner and strat viewer. Compatible with https://aetherdraw.me
Description: A realtime multi-user whiteboard raid planner to draw strategy images for encounters. Use /aetherdraw to open. Searchable database of community plans, supports https://aetherdraw.me users, external url plan imports.
Changelog:
v2.4.6.0:api bump, criterion support
v2.4.5.0: arena bg, job icon expansion
v2.4.4.2:API 14, 7.4
